_comment_demo: Target level for demo (village + forest). Script opens this level.
_comment_template: Source level to duplicate if demo_level_path does not exist (medieval village).
_comment_volume: PCG volume center and half-extents in cm (5000 = 50 m => 100 m box). Adjust to surround village.
_comment_exclusion_zones: Optional dead zones (no trees). Array of objects: center_x, center_y, center_z, extent_x, extent_y, extent_z (cm, half-extents).
_comment_skip_exclusion: false = auto-detect village/buildings and exclude so trees spawn around village; true = no exclusion.
